[Remote Worldwide] I'm pursuing a role in the high-scalability distributed systems space. I'm a well-rounded Scala/Rust/Python dev, well-versed in data engineering, with deep knowledge of the internals of distributed datastores. I have experience with data modeling for high throughput database activity and a strong understanding of which workloads and data access patterns are scalable and what datastore the data should reside in. I have a highly confident ability to lead a data / MLops project from start to finish. Hire me.Core Skills:● Cassandra (Data Modeling, Troubleshooting Performance And Operational Issues)● Apache Iceberg (Scaling, Tuning, Self-Hosted Setup)● Stream Processing At Scale: Kafka, Flink, Spark Streaming, Storm● Custom-Crafted TF-IDF / Embeddings, Vector-Based Semantic Search, Deep Intent Recognition In Search Engine Queries● Languages: Scala, Rust, Python, SQL (proficient), Golang (ramping up)Educational Background: Computer Science.Solid experience working remotely and working with teams that are distributed geographically. I typically work Pacific Time hours.Ask: $325K base, inflation-adjusted twice a year, 0.005% equity.
